name: HWR_CERTIFICATN_B
description: The certification table stores profile certification data.

columns.Name: CERTIFICATION_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the certification table.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: The Id of the source for the profile which has the certification.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: This is the name of the certification.

columns.Name: TITLE
columns.Comments: This is the title of the certification.

columns.Name: COUNTRY
columns.Comments: This is the country where the certification was given.

columns.Name: STATE
columns.Comments: This is the state where the certification was given.

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION
columns.Comments: This is the organization which gave the certification.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the start date of the certification.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the end date of the certification.

columns.Name: CERTIFICATION_LEVEL
columns.Comments: This is the level of the certification.

columns.Name: CERTIFICATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: This is the type of the certification.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
